subject: ts_import selection criteria got nothing.
body:
I'm trying to reconstruct a tomogram for tilt series from .eer files. When 
I run the following command, It doesn't generate a .tomostar file. I have 
checked the max tilt angle and  masker fraction and they are well within 
the limits. 

Any Idea what could be causing the problem? I would appreciate any help.

Here is the Output:

Running command ts_import with:
mdocs = frames/
pattern = *.mdoc
frameseries = warp_frameseries
tilt_exposure = 3.46
dont_invert = True
override_axis = null
auto_zero = False
tilt_offset = null
max_tilt = 90
min_intensity = 0
max_mask = 1
min_ntilts = 1
output = tomostar

Found 34 MDOC files, searching for *.mdoc in 
/data/Shan/tomo_reconstruct/frames/
Looking for frame series...
34/34
